name: Saffron Buttered Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, heat corn oil over high heat until the oil smokes.
2. Add 1 kernel of popping corn and heat until it pops.
3. Add the rest of the popping corn to the pot and cover with lid.
4. Gently shake the pot until the corn begins to pop.
5. Shake the pot vigorously until the popping slows down.
6. Remove from heat.
7. Heat melted butter with saffron threads for 1 minute.
8. Toss popcorn in salt and butter/saffron mixture.
